creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Let's close this issue already. No need to keep it open.
devel/jenkins is done
devel/jenkins-lts will probably be done in October

"The first LTS release to require Java 17 or newer will ship at the end of October 2024."
https://www.jenkins.io/blog/2024/06/11/require-java-17/
